name: SphereEx
description: Commercial company behind Apache ShardingSphere, providing distributed DB middleware and services.

seo.title: SphereEx — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: SphereEx: Commercial company behind Apache ShardingSphere, providing distributed DB middleware and services.

when_to_use: Commercial ShardingSphere with enterprise support and features
Distributed DB middleware as a service for Java teams
Elastic scaling and data sharding for MySQL workloads
Unified SQL routing across heterogeneous database clusters
Professional ShardingSphere deployment with SLA guarantees

pros: Active contributor to the OSS project
cons: Alternative distributed SQL options may be simpler
review.verdict: Enterprise muscle behind ShardingSphere, most new projects just pick TiDB or CockroachDB instead.
review.best_for: Enterprises running ShardingSphere wanting vendor support and consulting
review.not_for: Teams free to choose fully-distributed SQL engines over sharding middleware

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
